component_interactions_validated.interaction: Persona blend framework definition to execution

component_interactions_validated.validation: All 3 reference files exist and are documented
Read-only constraint documented, graceful fallback specified

key_findings.finding: Both SKILL.md and business-coach.md are at correct src/ tree paths per source-tree.md v5.3
All 3 required reference files exist: celebration-engine.md (4.4KB), confidence-building-patterns.md (4.1KB), imposter-syndrome-interventions.md (3.3KB)
Coach Mode and Consultant Mode definitions are consistent between SKILL.md (source of truth) and business-coach.md (implementation reference). Transition indicators align across both files.

SKILL.md explicitly documents read-only constraint on user-profile.yaml, graceful fallback to Coach mode when profile missing, and both profile dimensions (celebration_intensity, progress_visualization)

Both files meet documentation requirements: SKILL.md has 7 major sections (Workflow, Persona Blend Engine with Coach/Consultant modes, Transition Indicators, Profile Dimensions, Fallback Behavior, Confidence Detection, References); business-coach.md has 5 major sections (Persona Blend Instructions, Confidence Detection, Decision Tree, Applying Techniques, General Coaching)

coverage_metrics.coverage_type: Configuration/Markdown - Traditional code coverage not applicable

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests validating reference file content (celebration tiers in celebration-engine.md, confidence patterns in confidence-building-patterns.md, intervention protocols in imposter-syndrome-interventions.md)

Consider adding example personas showing Coach mode and Consultant mode blend in action (e.g., anxiety-aware blend for self-doubting entrepreneur, structure-focused blend for experienced entrepreneur)
Create test scenarios matching the confidence detection decision tree in business-coach.md to validate decision paths

verified: Valid YAML frontmatter with name and description
Persona blend instructions in core workflow
Coach mode: empathetic, encouraging, celebrates wins, addresses self-doubt
Consultant mode: structured, deliverable-focused, professional frameworks
Transition indicators documented (table in SKILL.md, decision tree in business-coach.md)
Tools restricted to: Read, Grep, Glob, AskUserQuestion (exactly 4)
Persona blend instructions and confidence detection in system prompt
Never writes to user-profile.yaml (read-only constraint documented)
Adapts persona blend based on celebration_intensity and progress_visualization
Graceful fallback to Coach mode when profile missing

br_001_persona_mode_language.requirement: Coach mode uses empathetic language; Consultant mode uses structured language
br_001_persona_mode_language.validation: Both persona sections exist with explicit characteristics and language examples

br_002_read_only_profile.requirement: Coaching skill reads user-profile.yaml but NEVER writes to it
br_002_read_only_profile.validation: SKILL.md contains no Write() calls to profile; explicit read-only statement in Core Workflow

conclusion.story_readiness: Integration testing complete and successful. All component interactions validated. Cross-file consistency verified. Story is ready for QA validation and release.
conclusion.test_quality: High - 27 new integration tests validate cross-file consistency, reference existence, and documentation completeness. All tests are authentic (anti-gaming validation passed).
conclusion.recommendations_for_next_phase: Proceed to QA validation. Consider adding optional integration tests for reference file content validation and confidence detection decision tree scenarios in future story enhancements.
